{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"202603201457528B9B7D8438DAEBEB63C2"}"},"total":3},"data_list":[{"comment":{"addition_comment":{"comment_id":"7581485172492731161","common":{"comment_type":-90,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"赵铁山不顾亲情，把养育多年的养女赵灵儿献给南宫烈，又干预她的婚姻，最后赵灵儿用生命诠释了真爱！既让人心疼又让人感动！作者写的太虐心了，寄小刀给你，扎你心[伤心]多痴情命苦的女孩"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765204108,"group_id":"7560342183354567705","service_id":13,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2476571761836141"}},"expand":{"book_id":"7560342183354567705","book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"78"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"10","score_suffix_text":"阅读6小时后追评"},"stat":{"digg_count":0,"forwarded_count":0,"listen_duration":3,"read_book_count":0,"read_duration":21608,"reply_count":0,"show_pv":0},"user_action":{"author":0,"is_author_stick":false,"stick_position":0,"user_digg":false,"user_disagree":false}},"comment_id":"7581010761014608665","common":{"comment_type":20,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"超好看，主角配角智商在线，吐槽一下，作者脑洞大开，把三个抢劫弄的太惨了，人家三人没得罪你吧。[捂脸]，不过还是特别期待作者快点更新，作者加油"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1765095575,"group_id":"7560342183354567705","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2NxhL3DtEZKRPAOdX0PqkeI61XC5e3hrcG0xr1H0XVCRW","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":1,"user_avatar":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-static/7b92beed15144f519898bfe689051d51~tplv-1yzifmftcy-expand:200:0:0.png","user_id":"2476571761836141","user_name":"柔勄县的欧阳正奇"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"2476571761836141","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7560342183354567705","book_info":{"abstract":"【热血+多女主+逆袭+非爽文+时灵时不灵系统+偏传统+慢节奏】
李牧穿越到修仙世界已经二十三年了，仍是修仙界最底层的五行废灵根。
本来想一直躺平的他突然觉醒了金手指。
李牧惊愕，别人的金手指都是秒天秒地秒空气，而他这个金手指光提示就算了，怎么还时灵时不灵的？
而在李牧获得一本绝世双修功法之后，被迫踏上征途，一步一步变强，同时携百花宗崛起，屹立于大陆之巅。
然而当他‘隐藏’的身份暴露时，等待他的是整个世界的觊觎与杀机。
...
直至无数年后，李牧携万千修士直面苍穹。
他才恍然惊觉：原来一开始，他就已经入局了...
